debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range (λ x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hM_le : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M := le_ciSup hbdd
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx).trans_le (hM_le x)
  have hM_g : M * |g y| ≤ M := by
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (abs_nonneg (g y)) with hg | hg
    · linarith
    · have h_bound : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M / |g y| := by
        intro x
        have h_abs : |2 * f x * g y| ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := h₀ x y ▸ abs_add ..
        simp [abs_mul] at h_abs
        exact (le_div_iff₀ hg).mpr (by linarith [hM_le (x + y), hM_le (x - y)])
      exact (le_div_iff₀ hg).mp (ciSup_le h_bound)
  exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_right hM_pos).mp hM_g
